description: Style Note Adopt a winning attitude with this blue T-shirt from puma. The stylish graphic print gives this tee a stunning look and the soft cotton fabric gives you exemplary comfort all day long. Pair this with jeans and casual shoes. Product Details Blue t-shirt with a round ribbed neck, short sleeves, brand tab appliqued on the left sleeve and graphic print on the front Material and Care Shell: 100% cotton Rib: 95% cotton and 5% elastane Gentle machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
